---
id: eth-get-uncle-count-by-block-hash
title: "Returns the number of uncles in a block from a block matching the given block hash."
description: "**`eth_getUncleCountByBlockHash`** - Returns the number of uncles in a block from a block matching the given block hash."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns the number of uncles in a block from a block matching the given block hash."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/eth_getUncleCountByBlockHash"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**`eth_getUncleCountByBlockHash`** - Returns the number of uncles in a block from a block matching the given block hash.

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["eth_getUncleCountByBlockHash"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":1,"maxItems":1,"items":{"oneOf":[{"title":"blockHash","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F\\d]{64}$","description":"The hex representation of the Keccak 256 of the RLP encoded block"}]}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_getUncleCountByBlockHash","params":["0xf1652d8322a880e520f996f7d28b645814a58a202d7d2ab7f058e5566fe4f9f3"],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"integerOrNull","oneOf":[{"title":"integer hex","type":"string","pattern":"^0x[a-fA-F0-9]+$","description":"Hex representation of the integer"},{"title":"Null Value","type":"null","description":"Null"}]}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":"0x2"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
